---
title: "The Raja of Saráwak : An account of Sir James Brooke, K.C.B., LL.D., given chiefly through letters and journals"
---

## The Raja of Saráwak : An account of Sir James Brooke, K.C.B., LL.D., given chiefly through letters and journals

**Author:** Gertrude Jacob
**Date:** 1876
**Imprint:** London: Macmillan

### Notes

Originally published in <i>MP</i> (August 1873- August 1874).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
